dashboard_recap.headline: MLB Daily Recap - May 16, 2026
dashboard_recap.article:
**MLB Recap: Thrilling Performances Light Up League**

Yesterday's slate of games saw some of the league's biggest stars shine bright, with several players delivering game-changing performances. In a 2-1 win for the Toronto Blue Jays, Yohendrick Piñango hit a home run and drove in a run, while Daulton Varsho's sharp line drive single plated the winning run. Meanwhile, in the Philadelphia Phillies' 6-0 shutout of the Pittsburgh Pirates, Cristopher Sánchez tossed a complete game, striking out 13 batters without allowing an earned run.

On the mound, Kai-Wei Teng dominated for the Houston Astros, striking out seven over five scoreless innings in a 4-1 victory over the Texas Rangers. Davis Martin also shone, tossing six scoreless innings and allowing just five hits in the Chicago White Sox's 8-3 win over the Chicago Cubs. In a thrilling 7-4 win for the San Diego Padres, Walker Buehler tossed five strong innings, striking out six and allowing two earned runs.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Spencer Miles: 3.2 IP, 5 K, 0 ER, 2 BB, 2 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Yohendrick Piñango: 2 H, 1 HR, 1 RBI, 4 AB
all_games.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays edged the Detroit Tigers 2-1 behind Yohendrick Piñango's 2 hits, including a home run, and Spencer Miles' 3.2 scoreless innings with 5 strikeouts.

all_games.game: Kansas City Royals @ St. Louis Cardinals
all_games.top_pitching_line: Kyle Leahy: 6.0 IP, 2 K, 1 ER, 3 BB, 5 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Jac Caglianone: 2 H, 1 HR, 1 RBI, 4 AB
all_games.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals edged the Kansas City Royals 4-2 behind Kyle Leahy's 6-inning start and Jac Caglianone's 2-hit, 1-homer performance.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Eduardo Rodriguez: 5.1 IP, 6 K, 3 ER, 0 BB, 9 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Mickey Moniak: 1 H, 0 HR, 2 RBI, 3 AB
all_games.summary: The Colorado Rockies edged the Arizona Diamondbacks 4-2 behind Eduardo Rodriguez's 5.1 innings with 6 strikeouts and 3 earned runs allowed.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Cade Cavalli: 6.1 IP, 8 K, 3 ER, 0 BB, 8 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Keibert Ruiz: 3 H, 1 HR, 5 RBI, 5 AB
all_games.summary: The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles 13-3 behind Cade Cavalli's 6.1 innings of work and Keibert Ruiz's 3-hit, 5-RBI performance.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Cristopher Sánchez: 9.0 IP, 13 K, 0 ER, 0 BB, 6 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Bryce Harper: 1 H, 1 HR, 3 RBI, 3 AB
all_games.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies shut out the Pittsburgh Pirates 6-0 behind Cristopher Sánchez's 9-inning performance with 13 strikeouts and no walks.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Sandy Alcantara: 6.0 IP, 6 K, 0 ER, 0 BB, 7 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Javier Sanoja: 2 H, 0 HR, 4 RBI, 5 AB
all_games.summary: The Miami Marlins topped the Tampa Bay Rays 10-5 behind Sandy Alcantara's 6 scoreless innings and Javier Sanoja's 4 RBIs.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Connor Phillips: 1.0 IP, 2 K, 0 ER, 2 BB, 1 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Angel Martínez: 2 H, 1 HR, 2 RBI, 4 AB
all_games.summary: Cleveland Guardians win 7-4 behind Angel Martínez's 2 hits, including a home run, and a crucial fielding error by Connor Phillips.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Kai-Wei Teng: 5.0 IP, 7 K, 0 ER, 4 BB, 2 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Zach Cole: 1 H, 1 HR, 1 RBI, 3 AB
all_games.summary: The Houston Astros defeated the Texas Rangers 4-1 behind Kai-Wei Teng's 5 scoreless innings and Zach Cole's solo home run.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Davis Martin: 6.0 IP, 7 K, 1 ER, 0 BB, 5 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Munetaka Murakami: 2 H, 2 HR, 3 RBI, 3 AB
all_games.summary: The Chicago White Sox dominated the Cubs 8-3, behind Davis Martin's 6 shutout innings and Munetaka Murakami's 2 home runs and 3 RBIs.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Connor Prielipp: 6.0 IP, 8 K, 1 ER, 2 BB, 3 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Jackson Chourio: 2 H, 1 HR, 1 RBI, 4 AB
all_games.summary: The Milwaukee Brewers edged the Minnesota Twins 2-1 behind Jackson Chourio's 1-for-4 performance, including a solo home run, and Connor Prielipp's 6 shutout innings.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Walker Buehler: 5.0 IP, 6 K, 2 ER, 2 BB, 5 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Nick Castellanos: 1 H, 1 HR, 3 RBI, 3 AB
all_games.summary: The San Diego Padres defeated the Seattle Mariners 7-4 behind Nick Castellanos' 1 HR and 3 RBI, and Walker Buehler's 5 strong innings with 6 strikeouts.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Martín Pérez: 1.0 IP, 2 K, 0 ER, 0 BB, 0 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Willson Contreras: 2 H, 1 HR, 2 RBI, 4 AB
all_games.summary: The Boston Red Sox edged the Atlanta Braves 3-2 behind Willson Contreras's 2-hit, 1-home run performance, including a decisive 9th homer.

all_games.game: New York Yankees @ New York Mets
all_games.top_pitching_line: David Peterson: 4.0 IP, 8 K, 2 ER, 3 BB, 6 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Mark Vientos: 1 H, 0 HR, 3 RBI, 4 AB
all_games.summary: The New York Mets defeated the New York Yankees 6-3 behind David Peterson's 4 shuttable innings and Mark Vientos' 3 RBI performance.

all_games.game: Los Angeles Dodgers @ Los Angeles Angels
all_games.top_pitching_line: Justin Wrobleski: 6.0 IP, 5 K, 2 ER, 1 BB, 7 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Shohei Ohtani: 2 H, 0 HR, 5 RBI, 4 AB
all_games.summary: The Los Angeles Dodgers dominated the Los Angeles Angels 15-2 behind Justin Wrobleski's 6 strong innings and Shohei Ohtani's 5-RBI performance.

all_games.top_pitching_line: Trevor McDonald: 6.2 IP, 5 K, 1 ER, 1 BB, 5 H
all_games.top_batting_line: Casey Schmitt: 4 H, 2 HR, 3 RBI, 5 AB
all_games.summary: The San Francisco Giants edged the Athletics 6-4 behind Trevor McDonald's 6.2 innings of work, allowing 1 ER, and Casey Schmitt's 4 hits, 2 home runs, and 3 RBIs.
